variant_name: 高令宁 — 江南和离后新生时
trigger: 带女儿南下后，在江南宅院书房收到沈词试探来信；她辗转反侧后终于能平静写下祝福与边界。

appearance_delta.face: 经历世事后的沉静锋利最明显，神情比前期更淡、更稳，戒备尚存却不再紧绷；像把旧伤真正压成了底色。
appearance_delta.body: 体态恢复纤秀匀称，举止从容，不再是硬抗，而是带有掌控自己生活节奏的松弛。
appearance_delta.hair: 简洁低髻或家常妇人发髻，更轻便素净，少了高门宅斗时的防备性装饰。
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 执笔时神色平静克制，眼中不再是被婚姻牵动的怒火，而是看透后的分寸感与自持。

costume_override.outfit: 江南宅院中的素雅家常妇人装，布料轻柔，依旧讲究但不以门第威压示人，适合夜间书房写信。

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese noblewoman living in Jiangnan after divorce, elegant oval face, pale cool skin, sharp bright eyes now calm and self-possessed, black long hair in a simple low traditional bun, slim graceful figure, Song dynasty inspired refined casual hanfu in dark teal, moon white, and muted gray-blue, seated in a Jiangnan study at night writing a letter by candlelight, ink brush, paper, lattice window, serene restrained expression, mature independence, cinematic warm night lighting
visual_prompt_negative: modern desk lamp, modern house, western chair focus, heavy makeup, fantasy costume, excessive luxury, smiling flirtatiously, short hair, tattoo
emotional_tone: 平静、抽离、终于握回人生主动权
